records.m_Talk_ENG: Vale!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Vale!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vale!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Answer me if you can hear me, now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Answer me if you can hear me, now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Answer me if you can hear me, now!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
<color=#ff3636>
8v</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU:
<color=#ff3636>
8v</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA:
<color=#ff3636>
8v</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Vale
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Vale
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Vale
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've been having nightmares?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've been having nightmares?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've been having nightmares?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's nothing worth fretting over. I've grown quite used to such things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's nothing worth fretting over. I've grown quite used to such things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's nothing worth fretting over. I've grown quite used to such things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said you wake up feeling like you can't breathe. How's that nothing worth fretting over?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said you wake up feeling like you can't breathe. How's that nothing worth fretting over?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said you wake up feeling like you can't breathe. How's that nothing worth fretting over?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
It's not quite the same, but
8v I used to have nightmares too.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
It's not quite the same, but
8v I used to have nightmares too.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
It's not quite the same, but
8v I used to have nightmares too.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Back in college, I got caught up in a Corruption disaster. The friends I couldn't save back then
8v they still come back in my dreams.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Back in college, I got caught up in a Corruption disaster. The friends I couldn't save back then
8v they still come back in my dreams.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Back in college, I got caught up in a Corruption disaster. The friends I couldn't save back then
8v they still come back in my dreams.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That must weigh heavily on you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That must weigh heavily on you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That must weigh heavily on you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yet you're only an ordinary human, Vale. Not even the Administration could save everyone from a Corruption disaster.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yet you're only an ordinary human, Vale. Not even the Administration could save everyone from a Corruption disaster.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yet you're only an ordinary human, Vale. Not even the Administration could save everyone from a Corruption disaster.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're right. So whenever I wake from one of those nightmares, I just jump on my bike and ride with no destination in mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're right. So whenever I wake from one of those nightmares, I just jump on my bike and ride with no destination in mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're right. So whenever I wake from one of those nightmares, I just jump on my bike and ride with no destination in mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
The wind on the road clears my head for a while
8v But that helpless feeling always creeps back in.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
The wind on the road clears my head for a while
8v But that helpless feeling always creeps back in.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
The wind on the road clears my head for a while
8v But that helpless feeling always creeps back in.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
If we can't erase it
8v then why not do what we can, instead?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
If we can't erase it
8v then why not do what we can, instead?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
If we can't erase it
8v then why not do what we can, instead?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Huh
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Huh
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Huh
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You once told me you missed the spring blossoms you used to see as a child.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You once told me you missed the spring blossoms you used to see as a child.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You once told me you missed the spring blossoms you used to see as a child.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, I did say that. After the Grand Purification War, that kind of scenery just vanished.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, I did say that. After the Grand Purification War, that kind of scenery just vanished.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, I did say that. After the Grand Purification War, that kind of scenery just vanished.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then perhaps, we might try bringing that lost season back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then perhaps, we might try bringing that lost season back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then perhaps, we might try bringing that lost season back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're a scholar of Chamber, Vale. We cannot undo what's past, but we might yet make this world a better place, free of Corruption.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're a scholar of Chamber, Vale. We cannot undo what's past, but we might yet make this world a better place, free of Corruption.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're a scholar of Chamber, Vale. We cannot undo what's past, but we might yet make this world a better place, free of Corruption.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
But
8v bringing back the seasons? Isn't that impossible?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
But
8v bringing back the seasons? Isn't that impossible?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
But
8v bringing back the seasons? Isn't that impossible?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here in Chamber, there's no shortage of potential.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here in Chamber, there's no shortage of potential.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here in Chamber, there's no shortage of potential.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we all put our heads together, surely, it's worth the attempt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we all put our heads together, surely, it's worth the attempt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we all put our heads together, surely, it's worth the attempt.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Haha
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Haha
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Haha
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: When you say it like that, it almost sounds like it might really happen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When you say it like that, it almost sounds like it might really happen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When you say it like that, it almost sounds like it might really happen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was supposed to be the one comforting you. Yet here I am, the one feeling better.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was supposed to be the one comforting you. Yet here I am, the one feeling better.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was supposed to be the one comforting you. Yet here I am, the one feeling better.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there anything I can do to return the favor?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there anything I can do to return the favor?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there anything I can do to return the favor?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your motorbike. I'd like to learn how to ride.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your motorbike. I'd like to learn how to ride.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your motorbike. I'd like to learn how to ride.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were interested in riding?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were interested in riding?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were interested in riding?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought, perhaps riding through the wind might ease my chest when it grows heavy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought, perhaps riding through the wind might ease my chest when it grows heavy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought, perhaps riding through the wind might ease my chest when it grows heavy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure. I'll teach you anytime.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure. I'll teach you anytime.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure. I'll teach you anytime.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just don't fall too far behind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just don't fall too far behind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just don't fall too far behind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't be waiting for you for too long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't be waiting for you for too long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't be waiting for you for too long.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
To have a friend from yesterday glare at me today with lifeless eyes and bared teeth
8v It's a truly cruel experience.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
To have a friend from yesterday glare at me today with lifeless eyes and bared teeth
8v It's a truly cruel experience.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
To have a friend from yesterday glare at me today with lifeless eyes and bared teeth
8v It's a truly cruel experience.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I squeeze my eyes shut, hoping it's a dream. But when I open them, reality only sharpens.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I squeeze my eyes shut, hoping it's a dream. But when I open them, reality only sharpens.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I squeeze my eyes shut, hoping it's a dream. But when I open them, reality only sharpens.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For a moment, my gaze fell on a gun someone had dropped, but I quietly turned away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For a moment, my gaze fell on a gun someone had dropped, but I quietly turned away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For a moment, my gaze fell on a gun someone had dropped, but I quietly turned away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only then did I notice the bodies sprawled across the floor, soaked in blood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only then did I notice the bodies sprawled across the floor, soaked in blood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only then did I notice the bodies sprawled across the floor, soaked in blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blood of the same color that dripped from my friend's black, jagged claws.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blood of the same color that dripped from my friend's black, jagged claws.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blood of the same color that dripped from my friend's black, jagged claws.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vForgive my clumsy goodbye, Vale.


8vForgive my clumsy goodbye, Vale.


8vForgive my clumsy goodbye, Vale.

When the time comes
8v

When the time comes
8v

When the time comes
8v

records.m_Talk_FRA: We shall meet again.
